backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the chat application, defining types and state for messages, chatrooms, user profiles, reactions, and active users, with functions for access control, messaging, chatroom management, and presence tracking.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features in ChatArea.tsx: flooring the live user count at a minimum of 1 when the local user is present, and removing the 'online' label from the user count display.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of components, pages, hooks, and configuration files.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the React app with cache-busting meta tags, a root div, and a versioned module script tag pointing to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that sets up TanStack Router with lobby, chatroom, and admin routes, and conditionally renders the Header and Footer (hiding both on admin pages).
frontend/src/components/AvatarPickerDial: Dialog component allowing users to pick an avatar via file upload, GIF search (Giphy), or removal, with debounced search and trending GIF fallback.
frontend/src/components/ChatArea.tsx: Main chat interface component that displays messages, handles sending and replying, scrolls to target messages, and floors the displayed live user count at 1 while omitting the 'online' label.
frontend/src/components/ChatroomCard.tsx: Renders a card for a chatroom with thumbnail previews for YouTube, Twitch, and Twitter media, displaying topic, category, live status, and participant counts.
frontend/src/components/CreateChatroomDi: Modal dialog for creating a new chatroom with fields for topic, description, category, and media (image upload, video URL, or Twitter post).
frontend/src/components/ExternalLinkDisc: Dialog that warns users before navigating to an external URL, showing the target link and requiring confirmation to proceed.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a copyright notice and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: App header with the Chattr logo, back-to-lobby navigation when inside a chatroom, and an inline username editor with avatar picker.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: No-op placeholder component that renders nothing, explicitly noting that authentication is not used in this app.
frontend/src/components/MessageBubble.ts: Renders an individual chat message with support for reactions, pinning, replies, media embeds (YouTube, Twitch, Twitter, GIFs), URL detection, voice playback, and reporting.
frontend/src/components/MessageInput.tsx: Chat input component supporting text messages, image uploads, GIF search via Giphy, voice recording, and auto-detection of YouTube/Twitch/Twitter URLs in typed text.
frontend/src/components/PinnedVideo.tsx: Renders a pinned YouTube or Twitch video as an embedded iframe within a chatroom, with an unpin button that calls the useUnpinVideo mutation.
frontend/src/components/VoiceMessagePlay: A voice message playback component with a play/pause toggle, a seekable slider, a randomized waveform bar visualization, and logic to pause other audio elements when playing.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates all non-actor queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDebouncedValue.ts: A generic hook that debounces a value by a configurable delay, returning the delayed value via a setTimeout-based effect.
frontend/src/hooks/useForceFreshChatroom: On actor readiness, purges stale or empty cached chatroom data and forces a fresh refetch of the canonical chatrooms query to ensure the lobby always loads correctly.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeartbeat.ts: Sends a periodic heartbeat (every 45 seconds) to the backend for a given chatroom room ID using a stable session ID stored in sessionStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login, logout, and status tracking via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposed through a React context provider and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central React Query hooks file covering chatroom fetching, message operations, reactions, pinning, image upload, and user identity utilities (username/avatar) for the chat application.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines light/dark theme CSS variables using OKLCH color space, and includes custom styles for mobile inputs, voice message range sliders, and layout.
frontend/src/lib/config.ts: Exports frontend configuration constants including the Giphy API key and result limit.
frontend/src/lib/formatters.ts: Exports a single utility function `formatCompactNumber` that formats large numbers into compact human-readable strings (k, M, B).
frontend/src/lib/giphy.ts: Provides functions to search Giphy and fetch trending GIFs via the Giphy API, returning normalized GIF objects with preview and original URLs.
frontend/src/lib/html2canvasLoader.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder or stub for a lazy html2canvas loader module.
frontend/src/lib/imageCompression.ts: Client-side image compression utility that resizes and recompresses image files using an HTML canvas, skipping GIFs/SVGs and falling back to the original file if compression fails or increases size.
frontend/src/lib/twitterEmbedRenderer.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder or stub for a Twitter embed rendering module.
frontend/src/lib/twitterOEmbedPreview.ts: Fetches Twitter oEmbed JSON to extract safe preview fields (author, text, image) with in-flight deduplication and localStorage caching.
frontend/src/lib/twitterOEmbedPreviewCac: localStorage cache layer for Twitter oEmbed preview data, supporting versioned entries with a 7-day expiration and cache key derivation from tweet IDs.
frontend/src/lib/twitterThumbnail.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder or stub for a Twitter thumbnail fetching module.
frontend/src/lib/twitterThumbnailCache.t: Empty file, likely a placeholder or stub for a Twitter thumbnail cache module.
frontend/src/lib/videoUtils.ts: Utility functions for extracting video/post IDs from YouTube, Twitch, and Twitter/X URLs, and generating corresponding thumbnail and embed URLs.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDeleteChatroomsP: Password-protected admin moderation page that lists all chatrooms with filtering/flagging options and allows admins to delete chatrooms after authentication via a hardcoded session-stored password.
frontend/src/pages/ChatroomPage.tsx: Page component that loads a specific chatroom by ID, manages view count incrementing, heartbeat presence, and active user count, then renders the ChatArea component.
frontend/src/pages/LobbyPage.tsx: Lobby page displaying all chatrooms with client-side search, category filtering, and algorithmic sorting (live rooms first, then by view count and recency), plus a create chatroom dialog.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, box shadow, accordion keyframes, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the Chattr app tracking existing features and pending fix requests, primarily around flooring live user count at 1 when inside a room, sending an immediate heartbeat on join, and removing 'online' text from the UI.
